member.name: T:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Exposes registration and login endpoints for dashboard users.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(EMS.API.Services.AuthService)
member.summary: Exposes registration and login endpoints for dashboard users.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(EMS.API.DTOs.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new Admin or Viewer user.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(EMS.API.DTOs.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token on success.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController
member.summary: Exposes CRUD, pagination, and dashboard endpoints for employee management.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.#ctor(EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService)
member.summary: Exposes CRUD, pagination, and dashboard endpoints for employee management.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetAll(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeQueryParams,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged, filtered, and sorted employee list.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single employee by id.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetDashboard(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the dashboard summary payload.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Create(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new employee record.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Update(System.Int32,EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing employee record.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an employee record.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Data.AppDbContext
member.summary: EF Core database context for the Employee Management System.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Data.AppDbContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{EMS.API.Data.AppDbContext})
member.summary: EF Core database context for the Employee Management System.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Data.AppDbContextFactory
member.summary: Design-time factory used by Entity Framework tools to create the DbContext.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload used to create or update an employee.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeResponseDto
member.summary: Response payload sent to the frontend for employee records.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeQueryParams
member.summary: Query string parameters for the employee list endpoint.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Generic paged result wrapper returned by the employees list API.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.DashboardSummaryDto
member.summary: Dashboard payload returned in a single API call.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.DepartmentBreakdownDto
member.summary: Represents one department's contribution to the workforce mix.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.RegisterRequestDto
member.summary: Registration request payload.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.LoginRequestDto
member.summary: Login request payload.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.AuthResponseDto
member.summary: Authentication response payload.

member.name: T:EMS.API.DTOs.ServiceResult`1
member.summary: Generic service result used to keep controller actions thin.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Models.AppUser
member.summary: Represents an application user that can authenticate into the EMS dashboard.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Models.Employee
member.summary: Represents an employee record persisted in SQL Server.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Services.AuthService
member.summary: Handles user registration, login, BCrypt verification, and JWT generation.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.AuthService.#ctor(EMS.API.Data.AppDbContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Handles user registration, login, BCrypt verification, and JWT generation.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.AuthService.RegisterAsync(EMS.API.DTOs.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new user with a hashed password.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.AuthService.LoginAsync(EMS.API.DTOs.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates submitted credentials against the stored BCrypt hash.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.AuthService.GenerateToken(EMS.API.Models.AppUser)
member.summary: Generates a signed JWT that carries the user's id, username, and role.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeRepository
member.summary: EF Core implementation of the employee repository contract.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeRepository.#ctor(EMS.API.Data.AppDbContext)
member.summary: EF Core implementation of the employee repository contract.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService
member.summary: Contains all employee business logic including filtering, sorting, pagination, and CRUD validation.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.#ctor(EMS.API.Services.IEmployeeRepository)
member.summary: Contains all employee business logic including filtering, sorting, pagination, and CRUD validation.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.GetAllAsync(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeQueryParams,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a server-filtered and server-paginated employee list.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single employee by identifier.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.CreateAsync(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new employee after server-side validation.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing employee if it exists and the email remains unique.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an employee if it exists.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Services.EmployeeService.GetDashboardAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Computes dashboard summary metrics and recent employees in a single service call.

member.name: T:EMS.API.Services.IEmployeeRepository
member.summary: Data-access abstraction for employee persistence and query execution.
